common.aiGeneratingSubtitle: This takes a few seconds. We're preparing engaging questions and results that deliver real value.

loginPage.tagline: Create engaging quizzes and capture leads
loginPage.descPassword: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard.
loginPage.descMagic: Receive a login link by email.
loginPage.magicLinkInfo: You'll receive a secure login link by email.
loginPage.errFillCredentials: Please fill in your email and password.
loginPage.errRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
loginPage.errSendFailed: Unable to send the link. Check your email.
loginPage.bannerNotAuth: You must log in to access this page.

signupPage.title: Create an account
signupPage.desc: Sign up for free to create your quizzes.
signupPage.errPasswordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.
signupPage.successCheckEmail: Account created! Check your email to confirm.

callbackPage.errExpired: This link has expired. Request a new one below.
callbackPage.errResendFailed: Failed to send. Please try again.
callbackPage.successResent: New link sent! Check your inbox.
callbackPage.resendInfo: Enter your email to receive a new link.

dashboard.title: My quizzes
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your quizzes and track performance.
dashboard.noQuizzesDesc: Create your first quiz to start capturing leads.
dashboard.confirmDelete: Delete this quiz? This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.welcomeDesc: Create your first quiz to start capturing leads and engaging your audience.
dashboard.noDataYetDesc: Create and share a quiz to see your stats here.
dashboard.sug1Desc: Add engaging questions to improve your completion rate.
dashboard.sug2Desc: Enable email capture and set up a sharing bonus.
dashboard.sug3Desc: Automatically sync your leads with your Systeme.io account.

quizForm.titlePlaceholder: E.g.: What kind of entrepreneur are you?
quizForm.introPlaceholder: Introduction text shown before the quiz…
quizForm.viralityDesc: Participants can share to unlock a bonus.
quizForm.bonusPlaceholder: E.g.: Get an exclusive PDF guide!
quizForm.aiObjectivePlaceholder: E.g.: Qualify my prospects for my coaching offer…
quizForm.aiIntentionLabel: Why are you creating this quiz?
quizForm.aiIntentionPlaceholder: E.g.: Invite to try Tiquiz, offer a free audit, propose training matched to profile, guide to my community…
quizForm.aiIntentionHint: Your concrete business goal — the AI generates a CTA specific to each result so visitors move toward it naturally.
quizForm.aiGenerateError: Generation failed. Check your connection and try again.
quizForm.targetSaved: Target audience saved to your profile.
quizForm.aiGenerated: Quiz generated! You can edit it before saving.
quizForm.aiObjectiveMulti: Select one or more objectives for your quiz
quizForm.aiChatDescription: Answer in a few sentences — I'll suggest angles matched to your business.
quizForm.aiChatKickoff: Help me find a good quiz idea for my business.
quizForm.aiChatError: Something went wrong. Try again or use the direct form.
quizForm.aiChatCapReached: Chat ended. Use the form to adjust.
quizForm.aiChatBriefHint: I'll generate your quiz now with these details.

settings.title: Settings
settings.sioDesc: Connect your Systeme.io account to automatically sync your leads.

tutorial.welcomeSubtitle: Create quizzes, capture leads, grow your list.
tutorial.welcomeBody: In 1 minute, I'll show you the essential tools. Ready?
tutorial.welcomeStep1: Create your first quiz in a few clicks
tutorial.welcomeStep3: Connect Systeme.io to sync your contacts
tutorial.welcomeStep4: Share and grow your email list
tutorial.welcomeOptOut: I already know Tiquiz, don't show this guide again
tutorial.completeBody: You've seen everything Tiquiz has to offer. Now take action: create your first quiz and set up Systeme.io.
tutorial.completeTipDesc: Here's what we recommend to get started:
tutorial.completeTipQuiz: Create your first quiz to test the flow
tutorial.completeTipSio: Set up your Systeme.io API key in Settings
tutorial.completeTipShare: Share your quiz's public link with your audience
tutorial.nudgeDesc: 1 minute to discover each tool and know exactly what to do.
tutorial.tooltipDashboard: Dashboard — your home page. Find your quizzes, key stats, and create a new quiz in one click.
tutorial.tooltipCreate: Create a quiz — build one manually or let AI generate it for you. Set up questions, results, and SIO integrations.
tutorial.tooltipQuizzes: My quizzes — find all your quizzes here. Activate, edit, or delete them, and copy the public link in one click.
tutorial.tooltipLeads: My leads — all contacts captured by your quizzes. Export them or sync with Systeme.io.
tutorial.tooltipStats: Statistics — track your quiz performance: views, completion rate, conversions, and shares.
tutorial.tooltipSettings: Settings — configure your language, Systeme.io API key, and default preferences.
tutorial.tooltipComplete: Tour complete! Create your first quiz, set up Systeme.io, and share your link.
